_comment: Parallax checkpoint layer - sensor plane (006), live-verified by the S1 spike (examples/spike_hooks.md, 2026-06-12): all three hooks fire; flag results block with the message fed to the model; hold results raise a permission prompt quoting the conflicting memory; silence is a no-op. Merge the 'hooks' object into your .claude/settings.json (server name must match your MCP registration, here 'parallax'). Off by default: nothing invokes the checkpoint tools until you install this. Uninstall = remove these entries; nothing else changes. All hooks fail open - a dead server never blocks your session. 016 adds the UserPromptSubmit -> surface entry (prompt-time memory push), live-verified by the S2 spike (2026-07-23): payload substitution, silence path, and the additionalContext round-trip all confirmed. surface is memory-gated - without VOYAGE_API_KEY the hook is a fail-open no-op.
